sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available. Game uses tile-based internally but tiles no longer affect character movement in visible way.

special_mechanics.name: Item Stacking Movement Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Objects and items can be stacked on top of each other, affecting movement. Some places are inaccessible unless the player stacks items to form stairs for traversal.

special_mechanics.name: Multi-Layered World Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Game world is visibly multi-layered, affecting how characters navigate vertical space within the game world.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics overview but no quantitative movement, gravity, or jump physics parameters. Game is RPG-focused with real-time system rather than precision platformer physics.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Ultima VII: The Black Gate (Gameplay section)
